prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document contains data and remediation updates specifically relevant to England, including funding and safety schemes applicable only to English residential buildings. It does not address building safety regulations or actions in Scotland, which are governed by separate legislation and local authority frameworks.
